Unique and Contemporary Crochet Patterns
for Beginner to Experienced Crocheters!

Patterns

Tutorials

Reviews

What we do

Crochet Patterns

Welcome to Crystalized Designs! We offer free and premium crochet pattern, tutorials, and reviews, as well as other crafting projects! Find the latest tutorials for beginners to the more advanced. Reviews can be found on yarns, tools, other designers, and more. Also, check out popular posts like The Ultimate Crochet List ~ 75+ Gadgets, Gizmos, & Goodies or the Crayon Water Bottle Cozy Free Crochet Pattern. Above all, join us in the crochet fun!

All patterns are written in English and use standard American English crochet terms. 

Take the “Crochet Whiz” Quiz to Find Out Your Score!

How much do you really know about Crochet? Can you get 15/20 of these questions correct?

Take Me To The Quiz

Variety of Patterns

Hairpin Lace Poncho

The Hairpin Lace Poncho may look intimidating to make, but it's a very easy beginner hairpin lace project. This pattern shows you exactly how easy it is to make. And if you've never tried hairpin lace before, check out the video tutorial in the Hairpin Lace Table Runner. 

Unconditional Love Candle Sleeve

Stunning and unique, the Unconditional Love Candle Sleeve is easy to make and lovely to decorate with. This candle sleeve is also a delightful gift to give. Candle sleeve is designed for battery operated candles only. 

Crispen the Snowman

Ahh, Crispen! He's the softest, most huggable guy around! You can easily make Crispen the Snowman for your own home or as a gift. With snowmen being an everlasting holiday favorite, you won't go wrong!

Verity Beanie

Want a eye-catching beanie this winter season? There's so many to choose from but the Verity Beanie is a fan favorite! This pattern comes with instructions for a beanie, messy bun, and slouch hat.

Make What You Love

Crystalized Designs strives to offer patterns that YOU will love to make and cherish for years to come! 

Handmade Gifts

Give the gift of crocheted love! With Crystalized Designs, there's plenty of patterns to create gifts from.

Year Round Crochet

Garment and accessories for all seasons are available, as well as many other enjoyable projects!

Lonicera Vest, a Premium Crochet Pattern

Amora Slouch Hat, a Free Crochet Pattern

Broomstick Lace Triangle Shawl, a Free Crochet Patten

testimonials

What they say

Deb 

Comment on Crispen the Snowman

"Hi Crystal, thank you for this really gorgeous little snowman, he has such a sweet face. I think one of the hardest things to do is create that very special face on a crochet or knitted toy, but you have done just that. The rest of Crispin is great too. Thank you for sharing this pattern, its much appreciated. Keep creating special things!"

Kay

Comment on Lion Brand Crayola Cakes Review

"Great review! I just got this yarn and am anxious to try it. Your kids and their water bottle cozies are so cute! Thanks so much for taking the time to share this information."
